steps.title: Define the needed trend from the passage
steps.content: The claim is that policy and market shifts led to natural forest regrowth by the mid-1980s, so the supporting evidence should show forest cover increasing over time after the earlier period of conversion pressure.

steps.title: Keep the timeline-specific increase
steps.content: Choice A compares only specific classes within 2000 and misses a temporal trend. Choice D compares different classes in 1986 only. Choice C highlights earlier declines from 1960 to 1979. Choice B states the increase in forest cover for all classes from 1979 to 2000, which directly supports regrowth. The answer is B.
